theme_info.title: myDeathValley National Park
theme_info.author: mp3li
theme_info.description: A minimal Death Valley National Park theme for the Innioasis Y1 MP3 player made by mp3li, featuring Death Valley National Park backgrounds and recognizing this land as the homeland of the Timbisha Shoshone, who know this place as Tumpisa. Part of the Defend the Parks collection. For other themes in this collection, visit mp3li's Patreon.
